heading: Printing additional copies for sale to public; regulations
label: 1705 Printing additional copies for sale to public; regulations
text: The Director of the Government Publishing Office shall print additional copies of a Government publication, not confidential in character, required for sale to the public by the Superintendent of Documents, subject to regulation by the Joint Committee on Printing and without interference with the prompt execution of printing for the Government.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 72 (, ; , ).May 11, 1922, ch. 189, § 142 Stat. 541June 30, 1932, ch. 314, § 30747 Stat. 409
Amendments2014— substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer”.Pub. L. 113–235
